author: rotifer-petri
description: Executes paper trades: matches arbitrage signals to eligible funds, calculates position sizing via Kelly criterion, and opens new positions in the paper portfolio. Pure computation, no real money moved.

signals.description: Scored ArbSignal objects from the scanner Gene

markets.description: Filtered MarketSnapshot objects for deduplication and validation

funds.description: FundConfig objects with current balances and risk parameters

timestamp.description: Pipeline execution timestamp for position record

trades.description: Executed paper TradeAction objects with fund, signal, and pricing details

transparency.note: Pure computation: position sizing and signal-fund matching. Paper-only — no real orders sent to any exchange.
